reviews.review_description: When i loaded in, it said something japanese on my menu and then after i was managing my downloads when a mysterious download was on my download page and it was the exact same thingnit said on my menu when i launched the app. DO NOT TRUST THIS GAME. and i forgot to mention, my cousin also said when he loaded in that he saw the game had a completely different name, it said something japanese also, but it wasnt the same one. so once again, DO NOT TRUST THIS GAME.

reviews.review_title: Scary but I have a question
reviews.review_description: Is there a discord. I want to run the socials channel for this if possible. It seems like it has potential.
I love the game very scary and very cool to Play it's my favorite very creepy and I like way you walk around looking for monster with the flashlight
But can more environments and content be added? prephaps make it a silent hill /exploration type game just like it displays in the video with the town and fog?
